ingredients.item:
PASTA
1 tablespoon kosher salt
16 ounces (454 g) farfalle or conchiglie (shell) pasta
ingredients.original:
PASTA
1 tablespoon kosher salt
16 ounces (454 g) farfalle or conchiglie (shell) pasta

ingredients.item:
YOGURT SAUCE
3 cups (720 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt
1 large clove garlic, minced
ingredients.original:
YOGURT SAUCE
3 cups (720 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt
1 large clove garlic, minced

ingredients.item:
TOASTED ALMONDS
2 teaspoons olive oil
½ cup (55 g) slivered almonds
ingredients.original:
TOASTED ALMONDS
2 teaspoons olive oil
½ cup (55 g) slivered almonds

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE PASTA: Fill a large pot with cold water, add the 1 tablespoon salt, and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Add the pasta and cook according to the package instructions for al dente. Reserve ½ cup (120 ml) of the pasta cooking water, then drain the pasta and coat it with the 1 tablespoon oil to prevent it from sticking.
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE PASTA: Fill a large pot with cold water, add the 1 tablespoon salt, and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Add the pasta and cook according to the package instructions for al dente. Reserve ½ cup (120 ml) of the pasta cooking water, then drain the pasta and coat it with the 1 tablespoon oil to prevent it from sticking.

ingredients.item: 2 MEANWHILE, MAKE THE MEAT MIXTURE: In a large skillet, heat the 2 tablespoons oil over medium-high heat for 1 to 2 minutes. Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, for 4 to 5 minutes, until softened and translucent. Add the ground beef and cook, breaking it up into small pieces with a wooden spoon, for 7 to 10 minutes, until browned. Add the 3 cloves minced garlic, tomato paste, 1¼ teaspoons salt, cayenne, and paprika to the skillet. Mix well and cook for 1 to 2 minutes. Turn off the heat.
ingredients.original: 2 MEANWHILE, MAKE THE MEAT MIXTURE: In a large skillet, heat the 2 tablespoons oil over medium-high heat for 1 to 2 minutes. Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, for 4 to 5 minutes, until softened and translucent. Add the ground beef and cook, breaking it up into small pieces with a wooden spoon, for 7 to 10 minutes, until browned. Add the 3 cloves minced garlic, tomato paste, 1¼ teaspoons salt, cayenne, and paprika to the skillet. Mix well and cook for 1 to 2 minutes. Turn off the heat.

ingredients.item: 3 TO MAKE THE YOGURT SAUCE: In a medium bowl, whisk together the yogurt, 1 clove minced garlic, black pepper, ¼ teaspoon salt, and mint with 4 or 5 tablespoons of the reserved pasta cooking water until a smooth sauce forms.
ingredients.original: 3 TO MAKE THE YOGURT SAUCE: In a medium bowl, whisk together the yogurt, 1 clove minced garlic, black pepper, ¼ teaspoon salt, and mint with 4 or 5 tablespoons of the reserved pasta cooking water until a smooth sauce forms.

ingredients.item: 4 TO TOAST THE ALMONDS: Heat the 2 teaspoons oil in a small skillet over low heat, then add the slivered almonds and toast for 2 to 3 minutes, until golden, stirring often. Transfer to a small bowl.
ingredients.original: 4 TO TOAST THE ALMONDS: Heat the 2 teaspoons oil in a small skillet over low heat, then add the slivered almonds and toast for 2 to 3 minutes, until golden, stirring often. Transfer to a small bowl.

ingredients.item: 5 TO MAKE THE CHILI BUTTER: In the same small skillet the almonds were toasted in, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the Aleppo pepper and cook, stirring continuously, for 30 seconds. Remove from the heat.
ingredients.original: 5 TO MAKE THE CHILI BUTTER: In the same small skillet the almonds were toasted in, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the Aleppo pepper and cook, stirring continuously, for 30 seconds. Remove from the heat.

ingredients.item: 6 Spread the cooked pasta in a layer on a serving dish. Spoon the meat mixture over it and drizzle with the yogurt sauce and chili butter. Garnish with dried mint, toasted almonds, and Aleppo pepper. Serve immediately.
ingredients.original: 6 Spread the cooked pasta in a layer on a serving dish. Spoon the meat mixture over it and drizzle with the yogurt sauce and chili butter. Garnish with dried mint, toasted almonds, and Aleppo pepper. Serve immediately.
